_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 14:06 UTC tick (heartbeat, 0 unconsumed events, 0 positions, broker $1000 matches). Material read: USDJPY 159.17 NOW TRADING ABOVE the 158.50 risk-off trigger — old alert thesis (break DOWN into risk-off) inverted. Web search (MarketPulse/FXStreet/JapanTimes Apr 16-21) shows USDJPY now inside the 159.45-161.95 intervention risk zone; Katayama (MoF) explicitly flagged 'bold action' after Bessent talks. Ceasefire expires 0000 GMT WED Apr 22 = T-~10h; Hormuz blockaded (IRGC formal), only 16 ships Monday, tankers being fired on, US seized Iranian cargo ship. Oil 86.47 day HI 87.40 (intraday spike faded), GOLD 4786 capped below 4800 bear FVG. 1 MODIFY (usdjpy_riskoff_break → usdjpy_intervention_fade_zone flipped direction + level + SL/TP). 2 KEEP. News queries: 8 all KEEP. Structure_watch: 9 all covered. Conditions: regime unchanged (oil/rates > safe-haven), cliff-edge binary T-10h.
pruned_removed: usdjpy_riskoff_break@158.50 cross_down (price 159.17 already trading ABOVE 158.50 — yen did NOT bid on Iran risk-off; instead USDJPY advanced into intervention zone. Break-below thesis invalidated; replaced with fade-zone SELL inside 159.45-161.95.)

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Catalyst LIVE Apr 21 14:06 UTC: Iran walkout + Touska/cargo seizure + Hormuz blockade (IRGC formal, only 16 ships Monday, tankers being fired on) + T-~10h to ceasefire expiry. Level 0.707 still ~1.1% below current 0.71545 (14:06 UTC, day lo 0.71434) — needs the ceasefire cliff to break it. Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 3.

Price 159.17 (14:06 UTC, day hi 159.21 day lo 158.70) pushing INTO the 159.45-161.95 intervention risk zone (MarketPulse/OANDA Apr 2026). Katayama post-Bessent said MoF ready for 'bold action' (JapanTimes Apr 16). Fade SELL on entry into zone — historical precedent: MoF intervened at similar handles in prev cycles. Needs M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on first touch of 159.45+ for 7-gate greenlight. SL 161.00 (above 160-handle stop-runs), TP1 158.70, TP2 157.20. Conv 3. Iran risk-off flip could still bid yen (2-way) — monitor M15 structure. Replaces old riskoff_break alert at 158.50 which went stale after price advanced above it.
